title: Smart India Hackathon (SIH)
description: Developed an Edge AI-based smart security solution for railways under the Ministry of Railways, operating fully offline on edge devices.

title: National Level Robotics Challenge
description: Co-engineered and programmed a terrain mapping rover that navigated a simulated lunar landscape in record-breaking time.

title: CodeChef Division 2 Star Contest
description: Finished in the top 100 competitors globally in a contested CodeChef Starters round, achieving a peak rating of 1850+.

title: Inter-College Algorithm Speedrun
description: Cleared all 8 advanced algorithmic problems in 43 minutes, outpacing 250+ teams in rapid code execution.
